summary: Phase 2: Context-Rich LLM Calls testing completed. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed a bug in ap_auto_post_service._record_success_feedback where vendor alias upsert was failing due to missing alias_id (MongoDB unique index constraint). Frontend verified: Knowledge Base tab in Intelligence Hub shows correct metrics (962 aliases, 122 domains, 603 profiles, 278K BC cache), health badge shows 'Healthy' (green), auto_confirm:1 source visible in Alias Sources.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Intelligence Hub, Knowledge Base tab verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing seeded knowledge base
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Context-Rich LLM Calls fully tested. Key verifications: (1) build_extraction_context returns ~885 chars for TUMALOC with vendor profile, 3 BC invoice examples, and aliases, (2) build_classification_context returns entity distribution showing 100% purchase invoices for TUMALOC with STRONG SIGNAL, (3) Vendor name resolution via aliases works (Tumalo Creek Transportation -> TUMALOC), (4) _record_success_feedback creates classification_corrections with source='auto_confirm' and vendor_aliases with confirm_count, (5) Classification pipeline imports and uses build_classification_context, (6) Invoice extractor imports and uses build_extraction_context, (7) Knowledge Base tab shows 962 aliases (including auto_confirm:1), 603 profiles, 278K BC cache, (8) Fixed bug: added $setOnInsert for alias_id in vendor alias upsert to avoid MongoDB duplicate key error.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Vendor alias upsert in _record_success_feedback was failing with MongoDB duplicate key error on alias_id index
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: The upsert operation did not include alias_id, causing MongoDB to insert with null alias_id which conflicted with existing records
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added $setOnInsert: {alias_id: str(uuid.uuid4())} to the update operation to generate unique alias_id on insert

build_extraction_context_TUMALOC.sample_content: VENDOR PROFILE — 'Tumalo Creek Transportation' (TUMALOC): Historical invoices: 18,713, avg amount: $1,687.28, PO EXPECTED: YES

build_classification_context_TUMALOC.sample_content: BC ENTITY HISTORY for vendor 'TUMALOC' (18,731 total records): AP Invoices (purchase): 18,731 (100%) → STRONG SIGNAL

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All data comes from real MongoDB collections (bc_reference_cache, vendor_invoice_profiles, vendor_aliases, classification_corrections).
